languages.text: Amulets cannot be equipped by the user.

traits.locale_text: Amulets cannot be equipped by the user.

languages.text: Amulets cannot be equipped by the user.
languages.original_text: Amulets cannot be equipped by the user.

traits.locale_text:
Amulets cannot be equipped by the user.
While they have {g|f:e026d82067804bca899de79f0650c6b6}crippled left arm{/g}, at the start of their turn, they make a shot with a random compact weapon in the form of a ring (even if it is not currently equipped) against a random target within a 4-cell radius.

Amulets cannot be equipped by the user.
While they have {g|f:e026d82067804bca899de79f0650c6b6}crippled left arm{/g}, at the start of their turn, they make a shot with a random compact weapon in the form of a ring (even if it is not currently equipped) against a random target within a 4-cell radius.
Amulets cannot be equipped by the user.

While they have a {g|f:e026d82067804bca899de79f0650c6b6}crippled left arm{/g}, at the start of their turn, they make a shot with a random ring compact weapon (even if it is not currently equipped) against a random target within a 4-cell radius.

Amulets cannot be equipped by the user.
While they have a {g|f:e026d82067804bca899de79f0650c6b6}crippled left arm{/g}, at the start of their {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, they make a shot with a random ring compact weapon (even if it is not currently equipped) against a random target within a 4-cell radius.

languages.text: Обладатель аугмента не может носить амулеты.
languages.original_text: Amulets cannot be equipped by the user.

traits.locale_text:
Обладатель аугмента не может носить амулеты.
Если у него {g|f:e026d82067804bca899de79f0650c6b6}покалечена левая рука{/g}, он производит выстрел из случайного компактного боевого кольца (даже если оно не экипировано) по случайной цели в радиусе 4 клеток в начале каждого {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}хода{/g}.

Обладатель аугмента не может носить амулеты.
Если у него {g|f:e026d82067804bca899de79f0650c6b6}покалечена левая рука{/g}, он производит выстрел из случайного компактного боевого кольца (даже если оно не экипировано) по случайной цели в радиусе 4 клеток в начале каждого {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}хода{/g}.
